title: Parkio Daily for June 26, 2026
teaser: 626 Day Stitch merch drops today; fall Disney World hotel discounts up to 25% off now bookable through Christmas Eve.

rides.name: Soarin'
rides.note: Dinner-hour windows often see walk-on waits

rides.name: Toy Story Mania
rides.note: New Toy Story 5 excitement driving demand

breaking.title: Fire at EPCOT-area resort closes Bourbon Steak indefinitely
breaking.body: A kitchen fire broke out yesterday at Bourbon Steak inside the Walt Disney World Dolphin Resort, prompting lobby evacuation. The upscale steakhouse remains closed with no reopening date announced.

parkioInsight.text: Dolphin Resort guests looking for upscale dining may need alternate reservations tonight. California Grill at the Contemporary or Citricos at the Grand Floridian tend to have similar menus and sometimes offer same-day availability.

bignews.title: Disney World drops fall and holiday resort discounts up to 25% off
bignews.body: Room-only discounts are now bookable for mid-September through Christmas Eve, with savings reaching 25% at select resorts. Package bookings also unlock a free Park Hopper upgrade during the same window.

parkioInsight.text: Availability tends to shrink fast on discounted dates near Thanksgiving and Christmas week. Booking within the next few days usually gives the widest choice of resorts and room categories.

bignews.title: Cinderella Castle Dream Lights will not return for Christmas 2026
bignews.body: Disney confirmed the iconic icicle light display on Cinderella Castle will remain retired this holiday season, continuing its absence from Magic Kingdom.

parkioInsight.text: Guests planning holiday visits solely for the Dream Lights may want to adjust expectations. EPCOT's Festival of the Holidays and Hollywood Studios' Jollywood Nights tend to offer stronger seasonal experiences this year.

bignews.title: Grand Floridian retiring flagship gingerbread house display
bignews.body: The resort's famous lobby gingerbread house will not appear this Christmas. Disney plans alternative displays for select guests instead.

parkioInsight.text: The gingerbread house was a major draw for resort-hopping families. Beach Club's gingerbread carousel and Contemporary's display tend to be the next-best alternatives, though both draw heavier crowds in early December.

bignews.title: 626 Day Stitch merchandise launches today with global pop-ups
bignews.body: New Stitch products arrive at Disney parks and the Disney Store to celebrate June 26 (626 Day). Pop-up activations are live in Newport Beach, Shanghai, Tokyo, London, Lisbon, and Taiwan cities.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition character merchandise tends to sell out fastest at flagship stores like World of Disney. Arriving before 11 a.m. usually improves your odds of snagging popular items.

topstories.title: Annual Passholders get up to 30% off fall and holiday resort stays
topstories.body: Passholder-exclusive discounts cover October through Christmas Eve, with savings up to 30% at select Disney World resorts. Florida residents receive the same offer.

parkioInsight.text: Passholder discounts often have tighter inventory windows than public offers. Booking mid-week arrivals in early November or the first two weeks of December tends to yield the deepest savings and widest availability.

topstories.title: Toy Story 5 in theaters drives Toy Story Mania demand
topstories.body: With Toy Story 5 now showing, Disney parks are seeing renewed interest in the Toy Story Mania attraction at Hollywood Studios and California Adventure. The parks blog released tips for higher scores.

parkioInsight.text: Toy Story Mania waits tend to spike mid-morning and after 2 p.m. when families finish other Toy Story Land attractions. Riding within the first 30 minutes of park opening or using Lightning Lane usually keeps waits manageable.

topstories.title: Orlando airport adds four new nonstop routes this month
topstories.body: Orlando International Airport launched four new nonstop flights in June, expanding travel options for Disney World guests.

parkioInsight.text: New routes sometimes offer promotional fares in their first few months. Checking flight prices within the next week or two may surface deals for fall and winter travel windows.

topstories.title: Mickey's Very Merry Christmas Party dates and tickets now available
topstories.body: Disney released full details and ticket sales for the 2026 Mickey's Very Merry Christmas Party at Magic Kingdom. The separately ticketed event runs select November and December nights.

parkioInsight.text: Early-season party nights in November tend to sell out slower and cost less than dates closer to Christmas. Booking mid-November usually balances lower crowds with full holiday decor.

topstories.title: Jollywood Nights returns to Hollywood Studios this holiday season
topstories.body: The separately ticketed Jollywood Nights event is confirmed for November and December at Disney's Hollywood Studios, blending old Hollywood glamour with Christmas festivities.

parkioInsight.text: Jollywood Nights offers lower crowds on Tower of Terror and Rock 'n' Roller Coaster during event hours. Guests staying late tend to walk onto headliners after the opening show ends around 8 p.m.

topstories.title: EPCOT Festival of the Holidays dates confirmed for late 2026
topstories.body: The EPCOT International Festival of the Holidays, presented by AdventHealth, returns this November and December with global holiday treats and entertainment around World Showcase.

parkioInsight.text: Festival weekdays in early December tend to offer shorter kiosk lines and easier World Showcase strolling than weekends or the week between Christmas and New Year's. Arriving by 11 a.m. usually means fresher pastries and full stock.

topstories.title: Disney Springs restaurant slashes prices for summer
topstories.body: One Disney Springs dining location has introduced reduced pricing for the summer season, addressing guest concerns about lunch menu costs.

parkioInsight.text: Summer dining deals at Disney Springs tend to disappear once fall crowds return in late September. Locking in a lunch reservation this week or next usually locks in lower pricing before any autumn menu changes.

icymi.title: Disney reveals first look at 2026 holiday merchandise
icymi.body: The company previewed this year's Christmas souvenir lineup, including ornaments, apparel, and home decor, arriving at parks and shopDisney later this year.

icymi.title: New Disney x Formula 1 collection available online
icymi.body: A collaboration between Disney and Formula 1 launched on the Disney Store website, featuring apparel and accessories.

icymi.title: Disneyland parks blog highlights best cold treats for summer
icymi.body: Disney shared a guide to ice cream, slushies, and frozen snacks available across Disneyland Resort to help guests cool off during warm park days.

icymi.title: Behind the Attraction Season 3 now streaming on Disney+
icymi.body: The documentary series added two new episodes focused on Disney Cruise Line, exploring storytelling and immersive design aboard the ships.

spotlight.title: Animal Kingdom debuts new Avatar-themed food and Bluey experience
spotlight.body: Disney's Animal Kingdom recently added Avatar-inspired menu items and opened a Bluey character experience, drawing families with young children and Pandora fans alike.

parkioInsight.text: New character experiences tend to see longest waits between 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. Arriving at the Bluey meet within the first hour of park opening or after 4 p.m. usually cuts standby time in half.

videos.title: Disney's Animal Kingdom 2026 | Park Update, Bluey Experience & New Avatar Food | Walt Disney World
